definition:
1. all together, all at once, all in a body , (Homer), attic; in attic, the Art. is often added in the case of Numerals, πέντ᾽ ἦσαν οἱ ξύμπαντες (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. with collective nouns, the whole , ὁ ς. στρατός (Herdotus Historicus); στρατὸς ς. (Sophocles Tragicus); ξύμπασα πόλις the state as a whole , (Thucydides); ξ. γνώμη the general  scope (of a speech), (Thucydides) 
3. τὸ σύμπαν the whole together, the sum  of the matter, (Herdotus Historicus); τὸ ξύμπαν εἰπεῖν (Thucydides) 
4. τὸ σύμπαν, as adverb altogether, on the whole, in general , (Thucydides), etc. (ML)
